channel.title: ClickHouse on MCP Toolbox for Databases
channel.description: Recent content in ClickHouse on MCP Toolbox for Databases

item.title: ClickHouse Source
item.description:
About

ClickHouse is a fast, open-source, column-oriented database

Available Tools

ClickHouse Source Tools

Tool Name Description
clickhouse-execute-sql A "clickhouse-execute-sql" tool executes a SQL statement against a ClickHouse database.
clickhouse-sql A "clickhouse-sql" tool executes SQL queries as prepared statements in ClickHouse.
clickhouse-list-databases A "clickhouse-list-databases" tool lists all databases in a ClickHouse instance.
clickhouse-list-tables A "clickhouse-list-tables" tool lists all tables in a specific ClickHouse database.

Requirements

Database User

This source uses standard ClickHouse authentication. You will need to create a ClickHouse user (or with ClickHouse Cloud) to connect to the database with. The user should have appropriate permissions for the operations you plan to perform.
